targets.query:
from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "k6_vus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "k6_http_reqs")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "rps")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "k6_http_req_duration")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (tables=<-, column) => tables |> quantile(q: 0.5, column: column), createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "p50")
  |> yield(name: "p50")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "k6_http_req_duration")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (tables=<-, column) => tables |> quantile(q: 0.95, column: column), createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "p95")
  |> yield(name: "p95")

from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "k6_http_req_duration")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (tables=<-, column) => tables |> quantile(q: 0.99, column: column), createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "p99")
  |> yield(name: "p99")

errors = from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "k6_http_reqs")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["status"] >= "400" or r["error"] != "")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

total = from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "k6_http_reqs")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

join(tables: {errors: errors, total: total}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value_total > 0.0 then r._value_errors / r._value_total else 0.0}))
  |> yield(name: "failure_rate")

total = from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "k6_checks")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)

passes = from(bucket: "k6")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "k6_checks")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] == 1.0)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)

join(tables: {passes: passes, total: total}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value_total > 0 then float(v: r._value_passes) / float(v: r._value_total) else 0.0}))
  |> yield(name: "pass_rate")
